title: Flight Speed Changer
description: Allows changing of flight speed through a command now backsupports earlier versions
body:
# Fly Speed Mod

This mod allows players to adjust their fly speed using simple in-game commands. Players can set the fly speed to any value between 0 and 10 or reset it back to the default value.

## Features
- **Customizable Fly Speed**: Set your fly speed to any value from `0` to `10`.
- **Default Option**: Easily revert to the default fly speed with a single command.

## Commands

- **Set Fly Speed**:  
  Use `/flyspeed (number)` to set your fly speed.  
  - *Example*: `/flyspeed 5` sets your fly speed to `5`.
  
- **Reset to Default**:  
  Use `/flyspeed default` to reset your fly speed to the game's default value.
  - *Example*: `/flyspeed default` reverts to the original fly speed.

### Command Breakdown:
- `/flyspeed (Number)`: Set the fly speed to a custom value between `0` (no movement) and `10` (extremely fast).
  
  ```shell
  /flyspeed 3   # Sets fly speed to 3
  /flyspeed 0   # Sets fly speed to 0 (no flying movement)
  /flyspeed 10  # Sets fly speed to the maximum value of 10


Note: Version 1.21.1 1.21 and 1.20.6 have been tested others have not but should work
Note 2: Fixed issue with non `JAVA_21`
